title: Inconsistent simulation before and after yosys synthesis(3)
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.44 (git sha1 80ba43d26, g++ 11.4.0-2ubuntu1~20.04 -fPIC -O3)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

1. Install the necessary dependencies (skip this step if you have already installed `verilator` and `zip`):
```
sudo apt-get install zip verilator
```
2. Download the attached `.zip` archive. Then change to the directory where this archive is located and unpack it:
```
unzip files.zip
```
3. Go to `files` directory:
```
cd files
```
4. Launch `yosys` like this:
```
yosys -p"read_verilog usbf_crc16.v usbf_ep_rf.v usbf_pd.v usbf_wb.v usbf_crc5.v usbf_idma.v usbf_pe.v usbf_mem_arb.v usbf_pl.v usbf_utmi_if.v usbf_ep_rf_dummy.v usbf_pa.v usbf_rf.v usbf_utmi_ls.v usbf_top.v; proc; opt -nodffe; memory; pmuxtree; flatten -scopename; opt -nodffe -fast; write_verilog usbf_top_dut.v"
```
5. Change the top module name of the synthesized module:
```
sed -i 's/module usbf_top/module usbf_top_dut/g' usbf_top_dut.v
```
6. Launch `verilator` like this:
```
verilator usbf_crc16.v usbf_ep_rf.v usbf_pd.v usbf_wb.v usbf_crc5.v usbf_idma.v usbf_pe.v usbf_mem_arb.v usbf_pl.v usbf_utmi_if.v usbf_ep_rf_dummy.v usbf_pa.v usbf_rf.v usbf_utmi_ls.v usbf_top.v usbf_top_dut.v usbf_top_testbench.sv -Wno-fatal +1364-2005ext+v +1800-2017ext+sv --binary --top-module usbf_top_testbench
```
7. Launch the simulation:
```
./obj_dir/Vusbf_top_testbench
```
[files.zip](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/17774809/files.zip)


### Expected Behavior

The expected behavior is the successful simulation result (without any discrepancies between the source model and the synthesized model).

### Actual Behavior

`verilator` gives the following output:
```
INFO: USB Function core instantiated (TOP.usbf_top_testbench.gold)
      Supported Endpoints: 4 (0 through 3)
      WISHBONE Address bus size: A17:0
      SSRAM Address bus size: A14:0
      Buffer Memory Size: 131072 bytes

 \clk_i_gold = 1
 \rst_i_gold = 0
 \wb_addr_i_gold =     22
 \wb_data_i_gold = 2515855685
 \wb_we_i_gold = 1
 \wb_stb_i_gold = 1
 \wb_cyc_i_gold = 0
 \dma_ack_i_gold = 56087
 \resume_req_i_gold = 0
 \phy_clk_pad_i_gold = 1
 \TxReady_pad_i_gold = 0
 \RxValid_pad_i_gold = 0
 \RxActive_pad_i_gold = 1
 \RxError_pad_i_gold = 1
 \DataIn_pad_i_gold = 206
 \LineState_pad_i_gold = 1
 \usb_vbus_pad_i_gold = 0
 \VStatus_pad_i_gold =  54
 \sram_data_i_gold = 2164649314
DUT Error at time                  630
 \wb_data_o :
Expected value          0, Got Value          8
[63500] %Fatal: usbf_top_testbench.sv:263: Assertion failed in TOP.usbf_top_testbench
%Error: usbf_top_testbench.sv:263: Verilog $stop
Aborting...
Aborted (core dumped)
```
code_blocks: yosys -p"read_verilog usbf_crc16.v usbf_ep_rf.v usbf_pd.v usbf_wb.v usbf_crc5.v usbf_idma.v usbf_pe.v usbf_mem_arb.v usbf_pl.v usbf_utmi_if.v usbf_ep_rf_dummy.v usbf_pa.v usbf_rf.v usbf_utmi_ls.v usbf_top.v; proc; opt -nodffe; memory; pmuxtree; flatten -scopename; opt -nodffe -fast; write_verilog usbf_top_dut.v"

verilator usbf_crc16.v usbf_ep_rf.v usbf_pd.v usbf_wb.v usbf_crc5.v usbf_idma.v usbf_pe.v usbf_mem_arb.v usbf_pl.v usbf_utmi_if.v usbf_ep_rf_dummy.v usbf_pa.v usbf_rf.v usbf_utmi_ls.v usbf_top.v usbf_top_dut.v usbf_top_testbench.sv -Wno-fatal +1364-2005ext+v +1800-2017ext+sv --binary --top-module usbf_top_testbench
